description: Phase 6 methodology gate enforcement split for the main-only repository workflow.

final_signoff.summary: The GitHub Actions methodology workflow is PR-only. Direct-main agent commits are enforced by local rch preflight commands and committed artifacts.

direct_main_local_gates.trigger: Every substantive direct-main change before commit or push.
direct_main_local_gates.rch_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_phase6_baselines cargo bench -p asupersync --bench methodology_baselines --features test-internals -- --noplot

direct_main_local_gates.trigger: Every substantive direct-main change before commit or push.
direct_main_local_gates.rch_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_phase6_golden_bench cargo bench -p asupersync --bench golden_output --features test-internals -- --noplot

direct_main_local_gates.trigger: Every substantive direct-main change before commit or push.
direct_main_local_gates.rch_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_phase6_golden_test cargo test -p asupersync --test golden_outputs --features test-internals -- --nocapture

direct_main_local_gates.trigger: Direct-main changes under src/runtime/scheduler/, src/channel/, src/obligation/, src/cancel/, or src/sync/.
direct_main_local_gates.rch_command: rch exec -- cargo flamegraph --package asupersync --freq 997 --bench methodology_baselines -o artifacts/flamegraphs/main-<bead-or-short-sha>.svg

direct_main_local_gates.trigger: Direct-main changes under src/obligation/ or src/safety/, or any changed .rs file containing an unsafe block.

forbidden_stale_readme_claims: Phase 6 methodology gates are enforced only at PR review time
All four gates are live today only on pull_request events targeting main
Generate the artifact before opening the PR
